title: Zelenskyy courts Saudi support as U.S. reportedly weighs redirecting Ukraine aid to Middle East
summary_full: Zelenskyy met Gulf leaders to seek support for Kyiv as the U.S. reportedly weigh diverting military resources to the Middle East.
